name: Solvr
description: Solvr is an AI powered crypto agent built on the Base blockchain. It provides a conversational interface for onchain operations across Telegram, X (Twitter), and a web chat client. Users can execute token trades, swaps, and transfers across eight chains (Base, Ethereum, Solana, BSC, Arbitrum, Polygon, Avalanche, Optimism) through natural language. Additional features include limit orders, stop-losses, DCA and TWAP automation, leverage trading (longs and shorts on crypto, forex, and commodities), real time token launch detection via onchain event monitoring, contract security scanning (honeypot detection, holder concentration, liquidity analysis, deployer history), technical analysis with standard indicators, prediction market access through Polymarket, AI image generation and editing, token deployment on Base via Clanker, price alerts, and X account monitoring for contract address drops. The SOLVR token on Base serves as a utility token, holders receive reduced fees on in-app games (daily lottery and PvP rock-paper-scissors), access to token launch notifications, unlimited AI image generation, and auto buy functionality on tweet watch alerts.
